# Search Engine Module

This module provides text search capabilities across the codebase.

## Features

- Text search across all indexed files
- Regex pattern matching
- Context lines around matches
- File type and directory filtering
- Result ranking by relevance

## Usage

```javascript
import SearchEngine from './search/SearchEngine.js';
import CodebaseIndexer from './indexer/CodebaseIndexer.js';
import FileSystemManager from './filesystem/FileSystemManager.js';

// Initialize dependencies
const fsManager = new FileSystemManager();
const indexer = new CodebaseIndexer(process.cwd(), fsManager);
await indexer.buildIndex();

// Create search engine
const searchEngine = new SearchEngine(indexer);

// Text search
const results = await searchEngine.search('TODO', {
  caseSensitive: false,
  wholeWord: false,
  contextLines: 2
});

// Regex search
const regexResults = await searchEngine.searchRegex('function\\s+\\w+', {
  flags: 'gi',
  contextLines: 2
});

// Filter results by file type
const jsResults = searchEngine.filterByFileType(results, ['.js', '.jsx']);

// Filter results by directory
const srcResults = searchEngine.filterByDirectory(results, 'src/');

// Rank results by relevance
const rankedResults = searchEngine.rankResults(results, 'TODO');
```

## Search Result Format

```javascript
{
  filePath: 'src/example.js',
  lineNumber: 42,
  line: '  // TODO: Implement this feature',
  context: {
    before: ['function example() {', '  const data = getData();'],
    after: ['  return null;', '}']
  },
  language: 'JavaScript',
  score: 1.0
}
```
